calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pertaining To Confirming The Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Dec-04-2025 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PETITIONER DAVID PLEIMANN Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pertaining To Confirming The Final Arbitration Award;

is OFF CALENDAR.
No proof of service for the notice of continued hearing on file.
No proof of Service for the Petition to Confirm Arbitration on file.
No proof of service for Notice of Motion and Motion for Entry of Judgment Pertaining to Confirming the Final Arbitration Award. Proof of Service filed on October 30, 2025 attests to service of Notice of Motion and Motion for Entr of the Terms of Arbitration.
Motion is not supported by Memorandum of Points and Authorities. CRC 3.1112

Judge: Anthony A. Trendacosta; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pertaining To Confirming The Final Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Oct-30-2025 Continued To Dec-04-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Plaintiff David Pleimann appeared in pro per

RE: PETITIONER DAVID PLEIMANN Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pertaining To Confirming The Final Arbitration Award

Plaintiff provides an unfiled copy of a proof of service.

Upon consideration, the Court grants a continuance of the motion for Plaintiff to provide adequate notice to the Defendant pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure 1005 and 1013.

Plaintiff's Motion For Entry Of Judgement Pertaining To Confirming The Final Arbitration Award is continued to December 4, 2025 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 501.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO ENFORCE ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER DAVID PLEIMANN'S MOTION TO ENFORCE ARBITRATION AWARD

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient notice per CCP 1005(b). The Court also notes that the proof of service attached to the moving papers does not comply with CCP 1013a, because it is not an affidavit made pursuant to CCP 2015.5. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Motion To Enforce Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-16-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PETITIONER DAVID PLEIMANN's Motion To Enforce Arbitration Award.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 on the same date. That department hears all real property related law and motion matters per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
